modal.title: Project Setup
modal.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close? Progress will be saved as a checkpoint.
modal.generationPaused: The generation process will be paused.
modal.resumeLater: You can resume your session later. All progress generated so far will be saved automatically.

checkpoint.title: Partially completed project
checkpoint.description: We found saved progress for this project.
checkpoint.confirmDiscard: Are you sure? This will discard the previous session.

restoring.title: Restoring session
restoring.description: Preparing the project to continue generation.

step0.title: Select Project Folder
step0.description: Choose the root directory of your project to begin analysis
step0.pathPlaceholder: Enter or browse for project path...
step0.dropHint: or drag & drop a folder here
step0.invalidPath: Invalid path. Please select a valid directory.
step0.notADirectory: Selected path is not a directory.
step0.helpText: Select the root folder of your project. This should contain your source code, configuration files, and project structure.

step1.title: Project Context
step1.description: Provide context about your project to improve analysis quality.
step1.descriptionPlaceholder:
Describe the purpose, technologies and current state.

Example:
"This is an inventory management SaaS for SMBs. Backend is Node/Express, frontend React. We use PostgreSQL. The payments module is being refactored. Team of 4 devs."
step1.tip: Tip: The more context you provide, the better the analysis
step1.architecturePlaceholder: E.g. "Node monolith we want to split into microservices"
step1.techDebtPlaceholder: E.g. "The reports module needs to be rewritten"
step1.projectDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this project does...
step1.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Any additional context that might help the analysis...

step2.title: Analysis Rules
step2.description: Configure rules for how the project should be analyzed.
step2.enableProjectMemoryDescription: Allows the AI to remember context in future conversations. The agent will be able to answer questions about the architecture.

depthLevels.minimalDescription: Essential files only. Good for quick overview.
depthLevels.normalDescription: Standard depth suitable for most projects.
depthLevels.detailedDescription: Comprehensive analysis including utilities and tests.
depthLevels.expertDescription: Maximum depth with advanced patterns and edge cases.

step2.includeTestsDescription: Analyze test files and include them in modules
step2.ignorePatternsPlaceholder: One pattern per line (e.g., node_modules, dist, .git)
step2.moduleDetectionDescription: How modules are detected in the project

step3.title: Module Selection
step3.description: Review and select which modules to include in the analysis.
step3.noModulesDescription: The project doesn't have a clear modular structure. Cannot proceed without modules to analyze.
step3.regenerateWarning: Selected modules with existing contexts will be REGENERATED and REPLACED. If you only want to create new contexts, use the "New only" button below.
step3.existingModulesWillBeReplaced: {{count}} existing modules will be REGENERATED and REPLACED.
step3.existingModulesKept: {{count}} existing modules will be kept unchanged.
step3.allModulesNew: All {{count}} modules are new and will be created.
step3.noModules: No modules detected. Try adjusting analysis rules.
step3.indexingDescription: Building code intelligence index with tree-sitter parsing
step3.clickNextForResults: Click Next to view detailed results

step4.title: Index Results
step4.description: Your project has been analyzed and indexed for code intelligence.
step4.noIndexResults: No index results available. Go back and run the analysis.

step8.title: Complete!
step8.description: Your project has been set up successfully.
step8.indexSuccessDescription: Your project code has been analyzed and indexed. The AI assistant can now understand your codebase via RAG search.
step8.codeIndexed: Your codebase is indexed and searchable
step8.askAiAssistant: You can now ask the AI assistant questions about your codebase
step8.ragAutoSearch: RAG search is automatically included in conversations
step8.startOverTip: Discard the current draft and analyze the project from scratch
step8.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell the AI what to fix, add, or remove (e.g. 'Mention Storybook in the stack, drop the Redux section')

depthLevel.title: Analysis Depth
depthLevel.deepDescription: Full analysis — structure, imports, exports, AST
